message:
test(core): comprehensive watchdog test suite (47 tests, was 18)

Add 29 new tests covering HeartbeatRegistry (default trait, created_at timing,
independent component recording, grace period expiry, multi-component degraded,
worst status propagation, ComponentHealth fields, report count/timestamp),
WatchdogConfig defaults, Component (ALL count, serde roundtrip, snake_case),
HealthStatus (Display, serde roundtrip, snake_case), unhealthy_components
empty check, WatchdogHandle shutdown, MuxWatchdog (report reflects latest,
total_failures accumulation, MuxHealthReport serde roundtrip).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
